description:
*NOTE:* Excluded Live Content
MVPD - ASG and Postseason
Partner - AppleTV+, Peacock
Blackouts - In-market games, ESPN Sunday Night Baseball
Games that do not involve the subscribed team

{panel:bgColor=#deebff}
*NOTE:* At Bat subscribers have the following entitlements: MLBN, MLBAUDIO, MiLB and SUBSCRIBERVOD
{panel}

This is the case for both Spring training and Regular season games.
gherkin:
Given the user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user has MLBN, MLBAUDIO, MiLB and SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlements
When the user selects any game for playback
Then the user receives unsuccessful playback of video feeds
And the user recieves successful playback of audio only feeds
And they successfully receives playback for the MLBN, VOD, SVOD, FLIVE, SLIVE, or out-of-market Free Game of the Day
